retry_reason: release_firmware is void and always succeeds; if the firmware pointer is an error (IS_ERR), there is nothing to release, so no retry needed.
contract_summary: Releases the firmware reference held in the board data (bd->fw) by calling release_firmware, and then zeros the entire board data structure to prevent use-after-free. This is a put wrapper: the caller must not access bd->fw after calling this function. Typically invoked during driver teardown or when freeing board data. The function does not return a value and does not require checking; it is a one-way cleanup operation.
